motion: Should PR #28: epic: Frontend Scaffold & Integration be merged into main?

council.note: Fresh review after prior council's 8 findings were all fixed

findings.description: sqlx missing chrono feature — timestamp/date/uuid columns silently render as null/empty in grid and CSV
findings.fix_description: Add chrono feature to sqlx in Cargo.toml. Add explicit match arms for timestamp/timestamptz/date/time/uuid in pg_value_to_json and pg_value_to_csv_string.

findings.description: Toolbar displays raw internal table name instead of display name — violates 'no visible SQL' design principle
findings.fix_description: Pass displayConfig?.tables[selectedTable]?.display_name ?? selectedTable as tableName to Toolbar.

findings.description: Duplicate localStorage key constant defined independently in App.svelte:16 and Sidebar.svelte:5
Stale comment references non-existent getInitialCollapsed() function
Zero frontend test coverage — no Vitest or Playwright tests for frontend logic
findings.note: ADVOCATE rebuts (scaffold scope, mock layer enables future tests). CRITIC downgrades from blocking. Tracked obligation: Vitest setup with assertShape tests before Epic 3.

findings.description: Justfile dev recipe does not detect backend startup failure
Mock total_rows inconsistent with row_count_estimate in TABLES array
DataGrid column width hardcoded at 150px for all columns
No fetch timeout — hung backend query produces infinite spinner with no recovery

prior_session.note: All 8 findings from prior council session were fixed in commits 5933501, 7f92f80, eb95851

follow_up_issues: Vitest setup with assertShape unit tests before Epic 3
Fix stale getInitialCollapsed() comment in Sidebar.svelte
Improve Justfile dev recipe backend failure detection
Add fetch timeout / AbortController to api.ts
